name: actions-runner

layers.command: RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl         git         git-lfs         jq         unzip         zstd     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c groupadd --gid 1001 runner     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid runner --create-home --shell /bin/bash runner # buildkit

RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=amd64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c RUNNER_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x64 ;; *) echo "${TARGETARCH}" ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/actions/runner/releases/download/v${RUNNER_VERSION}/actions-runner-linux-${RUNNER_ARCH}-${RUNNER_VERSION}.tar.gz"         | tar -xz     && ./bin/installdependencies.sh     && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/hooks.zip "https://github.com/actions/runner-container-hooks/releases/download/v${RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION}/actions-runner-hooks-k8s-${RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION}.zip"     && unzip -q /tmp/hooks.zip -d ./k8s     && rm /tmp/hooks.zip     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*     && chown -R runner:runner /home/runner # buildkit

RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c apt-get update     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends         ca-certificates         curl         git         git-lfs         jq         unzip         zstd     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c groupadd --gid 1001 runner     && useradd --uid 1001 --gid runner --create-home --shell /bin/bash runner # buildkit

RUN |3 RUNNER_VERSION=2.336.0 RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION=0.8.1 TARGETARCH=arm64 /bin/bash -o pipefail -c RUNNER_ARCH="$(case "${TARGETARCH}" in amd64) echo x64 ;; *) echo "${TARGETARCH}" ;; esac)"     && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/actions/runner/releases/download/v${RUNNER_VERSION}/actions-runner-linux-${RUNNER_ARCH}-${RUNNER_VERSION}.tar.gz"         | tar -xz     && ./bin/installdependencies.sh     && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/hooks.zip "https://github.com/actions/runner-container-hooks/releases/download/v${RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION}/actions-runner-hooks-k8s-${RUNNER_CONTAINER_HOOKS_VERSION}.zip"     && unzip -q /tmp/hooks.zip -d ./k8s     && rm /tmp/hooks.zip     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*     && chown -R runner:runner /home/runner # buildkit

description: Rootless GitHub Actions runner for Actions Runner Controller
